titulo: Prepositions of Time: In, On, At

preguntas.pregunta: [1/40] I have a very important meeting ___ 9:00 AM. Q: Choose the correct preposition for a specific time.
[2/40] My birthday is ___ October. Q: Choose the correct preposition for a month.
[3/40] We always visit our grandparents ___ Sundays. Q: Choose the correct preposition for days of the week.
[4/40] The French Revolution happened ___ the 18th century. Q: Choose the correct preposition for centuries.
[5/40] I love reading books ___ night. Q: Choose the correct preposition for the specific expression 'night'.
